channel.title: thelexibunch TikTok
channel.description: OK Boomer, all the latest TikToks from thelexibunch

item.title: The biggest difference for us has been being able to track each cat individually! After using our @Litter-Robot 4 by Whisker for years, upgrading to the Litter-Robot 5 Pro has made sense for our multi-cat household 🐱🐾 #LitterRobotPartner #LitterRobot #Cat
item.description: The biggest difference for us has been being able to track each cat individually! After using our @Litter-Robot 4 by Whisker for years, upgrading to the Litter-Robot 5 Pro has made sense for our multi-cat household 🐱🐾 #LitterRobotPartner #LitterRobot #Cat

item.title: They can turn anything into a fighting area 😼🥊 this sisal scratcher has been such a nice replacement for a cardboard scratcher that sheds everywhere! #fightingcats #funnycats #catscratcher #catbed #catsoftiktok

item.title: Putting your cat first means showing up for them every day. That's why we use @Fresh Step to keep their litter box fresh and clean 🐱 🐾 #FreshStepPartner #IsItCrazyOrIsItLove Febreze is used under license from P&G.
item.description: Putting your cat first means showing up for them every day. That's why we use @Fresh Step to keep their litter box fresh and clean 🐱 🐾 #FreshStepPartner #IsItCrazyOrIsItLove Febreze is used under license from P&G.

item.title: She paws things like this ALL the time! The feeding area, around the water bowls, the walls, the shower, mirrors 😅 (also yes she has bigger litter boxes too and does the same!) #catsoftiktok #funnycats #weirdcats #catthings #cattok
item.description: She paws things like this ALL the time! The feeding area, around the water bowls, the walls, the shower, mirrors 😅 (also yes she has bigger litter boxes too and does the same!) #catsoftiktok #funnycats #weirdcats #catthings #cattok

item.title: Feeding time in a multi-cat household is always a little chaotic 😅 We’ve been feeding @Open Farm Pet for 3 years now and I love that they always use high-quality proteins like humanely raised chicken I can actually trust. Lately we’ve been doing the RawMi
item.description: Feeding time in a multi-cat household is always a little chaotic 😅 We’ve been feeding @Open Farm Pet for 3 years now and I love that they always use high-quality proteins like humanely raised chicken I can actually trust. Lately we’ve been doing the RawMi
